risks.title: Multipart upload surface
risks.detail: POST /api/reels accepts video/thumbnail payloads — must require authenticated admin on backend.
risks.recommendation: Enforce Bearer auth on all upload routes and validate MIME/size server-side.

risks.title: Pre-upload validation endpoint
risks.detail: POST /api/media/validate inspects files without persisting — still a DoS vector if unauthenticated.
risks.recommendation: Rate-limit /api/media/validate and require studio session for anonymous clients.

risks.title: Storage inventory routes
risks.recommendation: Restrict media inventory to authenticated operators; avoid public listing in production.

risks.title: Destructive media delete routes
risks.detail: DELETE /api/media/storage/{file} and /api/storage/file/{file} can remove assets permanently.
risks.recommendation: Require admin Bearer token and audit-log every delete; confirm CSRF-safe methods.

risks.title: Orphan cleanup mutation
risks.recommendation: Gate cleanup behind admin role, dry-run preview, and two-step confirmation.

risks.title: Notification API surface
risks.detail: Routes under /api/notifications support list, create, read, and read-all by userId query.
risks.recommendation: Bind notifications to authenticated viewer identity; reject cross-user reads/writes.

risks.title: Workflow task write APIs
risks.detail: POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/workflow/tasks mutate production state without frontend Authorization headers.
risks.recommendation: Attach studio session token to workflow writes and enforce series-scoped RBAC server-side.

risks.title: Team membership mutations
risks.detail: POST /api/teams, member add/remove, and assign-task routes change collaboration permissions.
risks.recommendation: Require OWNER/PRODUCER roles on team mutations; validate userId server-side.

risks.title: Admin authentication endpoint
risks.detail: POST /admin/auth validates studio passwords — brute-force and credential stuffing risk.
risks.recommendation: Use rate limiting, lockout policy, and rotate default credentials in production.

risks.title: Admin session token in localStorage
risks.detail: reelforge_admin_session_token persists in localStorage and is readable by any XSS payload.
risks.recommendation: Prefer HttpOnly secure cookies or short-lived tokens with refresh rotation.

risks.title: Default admin password in client bundle
risks.detail: VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD falls back to admin123 when unset — may ship in client-accessible config.
risks.recommendation: Never embed production passwords in Vite env; inject at deploy time via secrets manager.

risks.title: Workflow client lacks Authorization header
risks.detail: workflowFetch does not attach Bearer tokens — relies entirely on backend enforcement.
risks.recommendation: Send Authorization on all mutating API calls from studio surfaces.

risks.title: Team client lacks Authorization header
risks.detail: teamFetch does not attach Bearer tokens for membership or assignment operations.
risks.recommendation: Propagate studio admin token to team APIs and verify role server-side.

risks.title: Upload auth header is optional in some paths
risks.detail: Vault and hero uploads pass Authorization only when token exists — empty header still attempts upload.
risks.recommendation: Block upload UI actions unless authenticated; reject unauthenticated createReel calls client-side.

risks.title: Broad localStorage persistence surface
risks.detail: Vault, feed, workflow, notifications, pipeline, and admin token share browser localStorage.
risks.recommendation: Minimize sensitive keys, encrypt at rest where possible, and namespace by user.

risks.title: Public media static routes
risks.detail: Videos and thumbnails resolve to /videos and /thumbs paths on backend origin.
risks.recommendation: Use signed URLs or CDN tokens for non-public assets in production.
